summary: Mira Pure OS comprehensive testing complete. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All core frontend features verified working: page loads, pet selector, Mojo profile modal with soul data, OS tabs (Today/Picks/Services/Learn/Concierge), Pillar tabs change picks, Chat with AI creates service tickets, AI responses are soulful and personalized (mentions pet name, allergies, chronic conditions). Fixed HTML hydration error (nested button).

integration_issues.issue: Services modal may not immediately reflect newly created tickets from chat (shows 'No active service requests' even after creating one). This is likely because the modal reads from local state, not refetching from DB.

passed_tests: Backend: /api/mira-pure/health returns ok with gpt-5.1 model
Backend: /api/mira-pure/pets returns pets for dipali@clubconcierge.in
Backend: Mojo pet has correct soul_data (personality: calm, drama-queen, motherly, food-motivated)
Backend: Mojo pet has allergies: ['chicken']
Backend: Chat API returns responses
Backend: Chat creates grooming service tickets (TKT-XXX format)
Backend: Chat maintains conversation context
Backend: Dog walker service creation works
Backend: Birthday party request works
Frontend: Page loads at /mira-pure-os
Frontend: Header with Mira Pure OS title
Frontend: Pet selector dropdown works (switch between Mojo/Mystique/Bruno)
Frontend: Mojo profile modal shows soul score (87%), personality, allergies, preferences
Frontend: OS Tabs (Today/Picks/Services/Learn/Concierge) all open respective modals
Frontend: Pillar tabs (Celebrate/Dine/Care/Travel/etc) change picks displayed
Frontend: Picks modal shows personalized items with 'Get for Mojo' or 'Have Concierge create' buttons
Frontend: Chat input accepts text and sends to API
Frontend: AI responses are soulful and context-aware
Frontend: AI references pet's chronic condition (lymphoma)
Frontend: Quick replies appear and change based on conversation context
Frontend: Concierge modal shows Start Chat/Call/Email options
action_items: Consider refetching services from DB when opening Services modal to show newly created tickets
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed nested button HTML issue (button inside button) in MiraPureOSPage.jsx line 843-866 - was causing React hydration error
Soul data personalization works well - AI correctly references pet personality, allergies, and chronic conditions
Function calling for service creation working correctly
seed_data_creation: None - test pet Mojo exists with soul_data, health_data, allergies
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mira Pure OS page at /mira-pure-os fully tested. Backend uses POST /api/mira-pure/chat with GPT-5.1 and function calling. Test pet Mojo (id: 699fa0a513e44c977327ad56) has allergies=['chicken'], personality=['calm', 'drama-queen', 'motherly', 'food-motivated'], chronic condition='lymphoma'. All modals work, pillar switching works, AI creates service tickets (TKT-XXX format).
